title: エリザベス女王杯にむけて

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So you came, Vodka. Are you prepared to battle
me for the Queen Elizabeth II Cup?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're the one who told me to come. Like
I'm gonna run from a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you're pretty confident. Since we're
both here, how about we make it interesting?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The winner becomes the queen for a day, and the
loser has to do whatever the queen says. How
does that sound?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Pfff... Queen for a day? You sure think up some
dumb games...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But fine, I'm in! Just don't take it back when ya
lose!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I would never. And besides, I don't intend on
losing.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now, what should I have you do when I'm queen?
Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't get ahead of yourself. I've got this
race in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! While I'm out there, you think of some
orders we can give Scarlet!
